img.src: data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22 width=%22400%22 height=%22600%22%3E%3Crect fill=%22%2315161a%22 width=%22400%22 height=%22600%22/%3E%3Ctext fill=%22%23747d8c%22 font-family=%22sans-serif%22 font-size=%2220%22 dy=%2210.5%22 x=%2250%25%22 y=%2250%25%22 text-anchor=%22middle%22%3ETidak Ada Cover%3C/text%3E%3C/svg%3E

div.p: Koleksi yang Anda cari tidak ditemukan...

img.src: data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22 width=%22400%22 height=%22600%22%3E%3Crect fill=%22%2315161a%22 width=%22400%22 height=%22600%22/%3E%3Ctext fill=%22%23747d8c%22 font-family=%22sans-serif%22 font-size=%2220%22 dy=%2210.5%22 x=%2250%25%22 y=%2250%25%22 text-anchor=%22middle%22%3ETidak Ada Cover%3C/text%3E%3C/svg%3E

data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22 width=%22600%22 height=%22900%22%3E%3Crect fill=%22%2315161a%22 width=%22600%22 height=%22900%22/%3E%3Ctext fill=%22%23747d8c%22 font-family=%22sans-serif%22 font-size=%2228%22 dy=%2210.5%22 x=%2250%25%22 y=%2250%25%22 text-anchor=%22middle%22%3ETidak Ada Cover%3C/text%3E%3C/svg%3E

b:with.value: "window.prompt(\"Copy to clipboard: Ctrl+C, Enter\", \"" + data:originalUrl + "\"); return false;"

b:include.data: { sharingId: data:sharingId, originalUrl: data:post.url, platforms: data:this.sharing.platforms, shareUrl: data:post.shareUrl, shareTitle: data:post.title, }
b:include.name: sharingButtons
